mapper.sql: attachment_seq, favorite_seq, original_file_name, stored_file_name, original_url, content_type, file_size, converted_from_hwpx, storage_path, google_drive_file_id, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM progist.bid_favorite_attachments WHERE favorite_seq = #{favoriteSeq} ORDER BY attachment_seq

SELECT
FROM progist.bid_favorite_attachments WHERE favorite_seq IN
#{favoriteSeq}
ORDER BY favorite_seq, attachment_seq

SELECT a.attachment_seq, a.favorite_seq, a.original_file_name, a.stored_file_name, a.original_url, a.content_type, a.file_size, a.converted_from_hwpx, a.storage_path, a.google_drive_file_id, a.created_at FROM progist.bid_favorite_attachments a INNER JOIN progist.bid_favorites f ON f.favorite_seq = a.favorite_seq WHERE a.attachment_seq = #{attachmentSeq} AND f.user_seq = #{userSeq}

SELECT
FROM progist.bid_favorite_attachments WHERE favorite_seq = #{favoriteSeq} AND original_file_name = #{originalFileName} AND converted_from_hwpx = 1 ORDER BY attachment_seq DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO progist.bid_favorite_attachments ( favorite_seq, original_file_name, stored_file_name, original_url, content_type, file_size, converted_from_hwpx, storage_path ) VALUES ( #{favoriteSeq}, #{originalFileName}, #{storedFileName}, #{originalUrl}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{convertedFromHwpx}, #{storagePath} )
